Package at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data

This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    Equation
    Interface for equations which consist of two TermNodes.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    EquationSystem<T extends Equation>
    A system of Equations
    Hedge
    A Hedge is a sequence of TermNodes.
    InputParser<T extends Equation>
    Tiny term parser with the following rules: [A-Za-z1-9_.] are allowed for variable names and function names.
    NodeFactory
    A factory to create TermNodes, Hedges and atomic types ( TermAtoms).
    TermAtomList
    A list of TermAtoms which is Poolable.
    TermNode
    A term node consists of a TermAtom and a Hedge.
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    MalformedTermException
    This exception is thrown if something goes wrong while parsing the input term.

Package at.jku.risc.stout.urau.data Description

This package contains the classes which are needed to build up the term tree.
